name: Guyan 2v2 — front/back segmented point value ($5 front / $10 back). Tests the segment->hole boundary at 9/10.
_contract: Same model as guyan-2v2-base-flat.json. pointValueSchedule kind 'front-back': holes 1-9 use frontCents (500), holes 10-18 use backCents (1000). Each net point => each cross-team pair moves netPointsA * (pv/2) toward A, where pv is THIS hole's point value. Asserts per-player net + netted edges. Money integer cents.
_handCalc:
front pv=500 (half 250), back pv=1000 (half 500). netPointsA per hole, then cross-pair += netPointsA * half.

H8 (par4, FRONT pv500): 4/5/5/6. low A4<B5 => A. skin 4<=4 => A. TT 9<11 => A. net-skins A=0 B=0 => 0. netPointsA=+3. cross += 3*250=+750.
H9 (par4, FRONT pv500): 3/5/4/4. low A3<B4 => A. skin 3<=4 => A. TT 8=8 tie => 0. net-skins A best3=birdie(1), B4=0 => A+1. netPointsA=+3. cross += 3*250=+750.
H10 (par4, BACK pv1000): 5/6/4/4. low A5>B4 => B. skin 4<=4 => B. TT 11>8 => B. net-skins 0. netPointsA=-3. cross += -3*500=-1500.
H11 (par4, BACK pv1000): 3/6/5/5. low A3<B5 => A. skin 3<=4 => A. TT 9<10 => A. net-skins A3=birdie(1), B5=0 => A+1. netPointsA=+4. cross += 4*500=+2000.

cross per pair = 750+750-1500+2000 = +2000 (B owes A). 4 edges b->a 2000. per-player a=+4000, b=-4000. total = 4*2000 = 8000. Boundary verified: H9 (front, 500) vs H10 (back, 1000) priced differently.
